Is 15972 a prime number?

[Question]
What could be the possible causes of toothache?

Toothache can be caused by a variety of issues, including cavities, gum disease, a cracked tooth, an exposed tooth root, or a sinus condition. Other possible causes include a jaw joint disorder, grinding or clenching your teeth, or an impacted wisdom tooth. Additionally, sometimes toothache can be a result of non-dental conditions such as a heart attack or angina, although these are less common. If you have a persistent toothache, it is advisable to consult a dentist to determine the exact cause and receive appropriate treatment.
